Appearances:
Plaintiff LRL Citigroup Properties, is present. Represented by Michael Mabeen.
Attorney, Edward Nagy, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Edward Singer, is present.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of NOV-15-2010 is vacated.
